title: WorkDocs - Permanent grey box around Dynamic Values

posts.author: ConnorWG8 (Connor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Having the ability to remove the grey boxes that are around the dynamic values in Monday WorkDocs would be very helpful.

When I export the document in to a PDF, it looks evident that they are editable fields when the grey box outlines the dynamic values. It would be very beneficial to have the option for it to be removed which in turn will look like a polished file.

What are you trying to achieve

I would like the ability to customise the Dynamic Value box on WorkDocs so that I can remove (or make transparent) the grey box around Dynamic Values.
